content:
“进食，是我们学会的第一件事。请来我身边吧，我亲爱的客人。
不必害怕，感受我的唇齿，划过你的肌肤与脏器。”

“啊……我的珍馐，我的爱侣……”

——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——

"To dine is the first art we ever learn. Come, dearest guest, come closer to me.
Fear not. Relish the caress of my lips, my teeth, as they worship your skin and viscera."

"Ah… my exquisite morsel… my delicious beloved…"
thread_title: V2.3 全新唤醒体✦杜勒赛因┊V2.3 New Awakener✦Doresain

content:
每个人都有最美味的部位：记者的声带、政治家的舌头、舞者的腓肠肌…

但，无法满足啊~残月如何与满月媲美？
渴望一具完美的肉身！一具像「杜勒赛因」般的至美珍馐：
「杜勒赛因」注视着自己被吞咽的遗体，一种前所未有的美妙滋味自共感味蕾传来——哈，真想全部吃掉！

疯狂的进食正以饥饿的名义汹涌而至：*“你也对我的味道感到渴望吗，守密人阁下？”*

——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——

Everyone has their most delicious part: a journalist’s vocal cord, a politician’s tongue, a dancer’s calves… but such small morsels only serve to highlight the void. A waning moon cannot compare to the full.

He craves a truly perfect body, a peerless delicacy! One such as *Doresain's*—he once consumed his own remains, and as he savored the unprecedented flavor, Doresain found himself overwhelmed by a truly delicious insight. Yes, indeed, to taste perfection, one must simply turn the gaze inward.

Hunger is the only master worth serving. *"Do you, too, crave the taste of my flesh, dear Keeper?"*
thread_title: V2.3 杜勒赛因情报：进食┊V2.3 About Doresain: The Epicure
